caption: The video begins with a completely black screen, which remains static for a few moments. As the frames progress, there is no change in the visual content; the screen continues to display an uninterrupted black background. At the bottom of the screen, white text appears, stating "theCUBE® is a registered trademark of ©SiliconANGLE Media, Inc. All rights reserved." This text remains constant throughout the sequence, providing a legal notice or disclaimer related to the content or ownership of the video. The overall scene suggests that this might be an introductory or closing segment of a video, possibly serving as a title card or copyright acknowledgment.
